ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the form */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the form */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the form */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the form was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the form */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the form was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the form (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the form (e.g., registration, contact) */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template used for the form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forms_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES form_templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form the attribute belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., acceptcharset, accesskey) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the attribute (e.g., String, Boolean) */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule for the attribute (e.g., required, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_attributes_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the form */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date when the form was submitted */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data submitted in the form */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_submissions_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form that encountered the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "occurred_at" TEXT /* Date when the error occurred */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_errors_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form being tracked */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., submissions, errors) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was tracked */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the metric (e.g., country, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission assignment */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned the permission */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form the permission applies to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission assigned to the role (e.g., create, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_permissions_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "template_data" TEXT /* Template data (e.g., HTML, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_rendering" (
  "rendering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rendered form */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form being rendered */,
  "rendered_at" TEXT /* Date when the form was rendered */,
  "rendered_form" TEXT /* Rendered form data (e.g., HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rendering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_rendering_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the integration that generated the log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "logged_at" TEXT /* Date when the log was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_logs_integration_id FOREIGN KEY ("integration_id") REFERENCES integrations ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., API, webhook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
